Quality Education.reason: Focus on communication skills and business awareness aligns with Target 4.4 ('relevant skills for employment').
evidence: develop and raise students’ business awareness

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Job preparation and communication skills training support Target 8.5 ('decent work for all').
evidence: communicate effectively in major business contexts

No Poverty.reason: The course's focus on 'job hunting' and 'career plan' provides skills for economic self-sufficiency, indirectly supporting Target 1.4 by improving access to economic resources.

Quality Education.reason: As tertiary education (Target 4.3), the course explicitly develops 'relevant skills... for employment' (Target 4.4) through 'job hunting' and 'communication' training.

Gender Equality.reason: By providing 'necessary skills for job hunting' to all students, the course implicitly supports equal opportunities in economic life, a component of Target 5.5.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course is fundamentally about preparing students for decent work (Target 8.5, 8.6) through training in 'job hunting,' 'career plan,' and 'communication at work.'

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Skills like 'persuasive speech' and 'problem solving' are foundational for innovation, a minor, inferred link to Target 9.5 (encouraging innovation).
evidence: 問題解決能力(Students will acquire problem solving skills.)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Promotes economic inclusion (Target 10.2) and equal opportunity (Target 10.3) by equipping students with 'necessary skills for job hunting' regardless of their background.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The core competency explicitly includes 'sustainability issues.' Topics like 'crisis management' can relate to companies adopting sustainable practices (Target 12.6).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Training in 'negotiating,' 'crisis management,' and 'ethics' supports accountable institutions (Target 16.6) and can help reduce corporate corruption (Target 16.5).
evidence: 理解與辨別道德、社會責任 (understand and be able to identify ethics, social responsibility)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Develops 'communication' and 'team合作' (teamwork) skills, which are essential for building the effective partnerships mentioned in Target 17.17.
evidence: 團隊合作與領導能力(Students will be able to work effectively in teams as well as develop leadership skills.)

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course's focus on sustainability issues aligns with Target 12.6.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Training in ethics and crisis management supports accountable institutions, aligning with Target 16.6.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing communication and teamwork skills supports effective partnerships, aligning with Target 17.17.
